dimensions.notes: recordResult forward-reexpansion gate was kind===review only. Widen to review||security; verify stays out (pass/fail on AC, not a findings-to-fix list).

The spliced re-check node must preserve the originating kind: a security finding is re-verified by a security pass, not a generic review. planForwardReexpansion uses reviewNode.kind for the re-check node; fix node stays implementer-owned.

questions.question: Which node kinds opt into forward re-expansion when findings remain?
questions.why_matters: security produces a findings list needing fix-then-recheck, same shape as review; verify does not.
questions.answer: review and security. verify excluded (different semantics).

questions.question: What kind is the re-check node spliced after a security fix?
questions.why_matters: A generic review would drop the security specificity after round 0.
questions.answer: Same kind as the originating node (security→security); fix stays fix/implementer.

assumptions.statement: review and security. verify excluded (different semantics).
assumptions.label: hypothesis

assumptions.statement: Same kind as the originating node (security→security); fix stays fix/implementer.
assumptions.label: hypothesis
